description: Package a project (framework detect + tar) and deploy it to Vercel via the claimable deploy endpoint.
rules: destructive: pushes a tarball to a live Vercel endpoint (codex-deploy-skills.vercel.sh)
stages files (excludes node_modules/.git/.env), tars, POSTs, polls the preview URL
returns JSON with previewUrl + claimUrl in deploy.json
usage: Set PROJECT_PATH (a project dir or an existing .tgz tarball). Output: deploy.json (previewUrl, claimUrl, deploymentId, projectId).
limitation: Deploys as a preview via the claimable endpoint (no account). Needs network; cannot run hermetically. Build polling caps at ~5 minutes.
